sources: Montgomery County BoE Democratic Central Committee Filing Report (05/02/2026)
Montgomery County BoE Libertarian Central Committee Filing Report (02/20/2026)
notes: Keys match exact PRECINCT_NAME values in enriched_voters.parquet (verified 2026-06-23).
Republican central committee data not yet loaded — R entries are stubs (status: data_pending).
D status: 'uncontested' = single filer elected; 'contested' = multiple filers (certified result needed to determine winner); 'vacant' = no candidate filed.
Candidates without party suffix in BoE filing have party: null (crossfiler or unaffiliated registrant running in D primary).
DEM source is a pre-election filing report (05/02/2026), NOT certified results. Contested races need BoE result lookup.
DAYTON 4-B: present in parquet but absent from DEM filing report (ballot number 0650 skipped — no D race on file). Treated as vacant.
ENGLEWOOD-I: present in parquet but absent from DEM filing report (ballot number 1430 skipped — ENG-H at 1420, ENG-J at 1440). Treated as vacant.
